def positive_event_loop_path_executes_cpu_bound_transformation_synchronously():
    rule_id = "event_loop_path_executes_cpu_bound_transformation_synchronously"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag async paths that perform large CPU-bound transforms inline."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
